stemHtml: While enroute, you encounter a thunderstorm and use your Airborne Weather Radar (AWR) to assess the situation. What is the most appropriate course of action?

options.a: Locate “holes” in the storm cells to fly through.
options.b: Use the radar to scan the height of the thunderstorm and determine if the aircraft can safely climb above it.
options.c: Fly under the thunderstorm, maintaining VFR conditions.
options.d: Turn back or divert to avoid the thunderstorm entirely.
